name: Pesach Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and stir in the cocoa until fully dissolved.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Beat eggs until light, then beat in sugars.
4. Add the cocoa mixture to the egg mixture.
5. Mix in the matzo meal.
6. Pour into a greased 9" x 13-inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
